main.head: Changes to the Frontier Communications Corporation stock price to affect your Classic Option positions
main.text:
Effective Monday, July 10th, Frontier Communications Corporation (FTR) has approved a reverse stock split at a ratio of one new share for every fifteen old shares. All Classic Options contracts for the company will have to be adjusted accordingly. Any fractional contract will be rounded up to a full contract. For example, for 1000 old contract there will be 67 new ones, instead of 66.66.

In the light of this corporate event, the asset will be unavailable for trading on the IQ Option platform approximately between 13:30 and 14:30 GMT (on Monday). After this time, all features of any opened position will be adjusted to reflect the new market conditions.
